scripts.clean:all: rm -rf node_modules tooling/satsuma-cli/node_modules tooling/satsuma-core/node_modules tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma/node_modules tooling/satsuma-viz/node_modules tooling/vscode-satsuma/node_modules tooling/vscode-satsuma/server/node_modules
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-core install && npm --prefix tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma install && cd tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma && tree-sitter build --wasm . -o tree-sitter-satsuma.wasm && cd ../.. && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-cli install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz run build && npm --prefix tooling/vscode-satsuma install && npm --prefix tooling/vscode-satsuma/server install && npm --prefix tooling/vscode-satsuma run build:server
scripts.ci:all: npm ci && npm ci --prefix tooling/satsuma-core && npm ci --prefix tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma && npm ci --ignore-scripts --prefix tooling/satsuma-cli && npm ci --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz && npm ci --prefix tooling/vscode-satsuma && npm ci --prefix tooling/vscode-satsuma/server
scripts.reinstall: npm run clean:all && npm run install:all
